caveats: Two distinct evidence layers — canonical and binding_envelope. Values are not contradictory; scope must be explicit when surfacing either value.
explanation: The canonical topology model (17/42/89) has no cross-domain overlap edges — the single cross_domain_ref on COMP-25 ("DOM-01") is a known source peculiarity preserved as a node field, not an edge. The binding_envelope for client run_335c0575a080 shows 2 structural overlaps: OVL-01 (DOM-03↔DOM-05-C) and OVL-02 (DOM-04↔DOM-05-D). These are different evidence layers and are not contradictory — canonical answers what is structurally present; binding_envelope answers how the client's system specifically structures that presence.
